taskResults.notes: Added process.exitCode = 1 in the verify-removal CLI action when any verdict is "red", mirroring explain's existing exit-code pattern. No engine changes needed — RemovalVerdict already distinguishes green/red/unresolved.

Flipped test/cli-verify-removal.test.ts's red-verdict test to assert exit code 1 (was asserting 0, which documented the bug). Watched it fail RED against unfixed code before implementing T1, then confirmed green.

Added a mixed red+unresolved regression test proving a red verdict anywhere in a multi-symbol run still exits non-zero. Passed on first run (T1's .some() check already covers it) — full suite green: build+typecheck+435 passed/2 skipped test files.
